title: Dua Nabi Idris - Dua for sahar time (commencing the fast)

duas.title: Dua Nabi Idris - Dua-e-Sahar
duas.description: It is recommended to recite the Du`a' Idris (the Supplication of Idris), which has been mentioned by Shaykh al-Tusiy and Sayyid Ibn Tawus in the books of Misbah al-Mutahajjid or Iqbal al-A`mal.

segments.arabic: سُبْحانَكَ لا إلَهَ إلاّ أنتَ
segments.transliteration: subhanaka la ilaha illa anta
segments.translation: Glory be to You. There is no god save You.

segments.arabic: يا رَبَّ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَوارِثَهُ
segments.transliteration: ya rabba kulli shay‘in wawarithahu
segments.translation: O the Lord and the Inheritor of all things.

segments.arabic: يا إلَهَ الآلِهَةِ الرَّفيعُ جَلالُهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya ilaha al-alihati alrrafi`u jalaluhu,
segments.translation: O the God of gods; whose majesty is elevated.

segments.arabic: يا اَللهُ المَحْمودُ في كُلِّ فِعالِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya allahu almahmudu fy kulli fi`alihi,
segments.translation: O Allah, the Praised for all of His acts.

segments.arabic: يا رَحْمنَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَراحِمَهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya rahmana kulli shay‘in warahimahu,
segments.translation: O the All-beneficent and the All-merciful of all things.

segments.arabic: يا حَيُّ حينَ لا حَيُّ في دَيْمومَةِ مُلكِهِ وَبَقائِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya hayyu hina la hayyu fy daymumati mulkihi wabaqa’ihi,
segments.translation: O the Ever-living, when there was nothing existent, in the perpetuity of His kingdom and eternity.

segments.arabic: يا قَيُّومُ فَلا يَفوتُ شَيْءٌ مِنْ عِلْمِهِ وَلا يَؤودُهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya qayyumu fala yafutu shay‘un min `ilmihi wala yau´uduhu,
segments.translation: O the Self-Subsisting; nothing can be missed by Your knowledge and nothing can ever tire Him.

segments.arabic: يا واحِدُ البَاقِي أوَّلَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَآخِرَهُ.
segments.transliteration: ya wahidu albaqiy awwala kulli shay‘in wakhirahu.
segments.translation: O the One, the Everlasting, the First and the Last of all things.

segments.arabic: يا دائِمُ بِغَيْرِ فَناءٍ وَلا زَوالَ لِمُلْكِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya da’imu bighayri fana‘in wala zawala limulkihi,
segments.translation: O the Perpetual without extinction, and His kingdom is never exposed to extermination.

segments.arabic: يا صَمَدُ في غَيْرِ شَبيهٍ وَلا شَيْءَ كَمِثْلِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya samadu fy ghayri shabihin wala shay‘a kamithlihi,
segments.translation: O the Besought of all; without being any match to Him and there is nothing like Him.

segments.arabic: يا بارُّ فَلا شَيْءَ كُفْوُهُ وَلا مُدانِيَ لِوَصْفِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya barru fala shay‘a kuf’uhu walamudaniya liwasfihi,
segments.translation: O the Upright; nothing can be His equal and nothing can even approach Him in attributes.

segments.arabic: يا كَبيرُ أنْتَ الَّذي لا تَهْتَدي القُلوبُ لِعَظَمَتِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya kabiru anta alladhy la tahtady alqulubu li`azamatihi,
segments.translation: O the All-big; it is You Whose greatness cannot be hit by hearts.

segments.arabic: يا بارِئُ الْمُنْشَيْءَ بِلا مِثالٍ خَلا مِنْ غَيْرِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya bari’u almunshi‘u bila mithalin khalamin ghayrihi,
segments.translation: O the Originator, the Maker, without having any equivalent.

segments.arabic: يا زاكي الطّاهِرُ مِنْ كُلِّ آفَةٍ بِقُدْسِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya zaky alttahiru min kulli afatin biqudsihi,
segments.translation: O the Pure, the Safe from any defect due to His Holiness.

segments.arabic: يا كافي الْمُوسِعُ لِما خَلَقَ مِنْ عَطايا فَضْلِهِ.
segments.transliteration: ya kafy almuwsi`u lima khalaqa min `ataya fadlihi.
segments.translation: O the Self-Sufficient, the Bestower upon His creatures with the gifts of His favors.

segments.arabic: يا نَقِيُّ مِنْ كُلِّ جَوْرٍ لَمْ يَرْضَهُ وَلَمْ يُخالِطْهُ فِعالَهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya naqiyyu min kulli jawrin lam yardahu walam yukhalithu fi`alahu,
segments.translation: O the Pufiried against any injustice that He does not accept and that is not found in His deeds.

segments.arabic: يا حَنّانُ أنْتَ الَّذي وَسِعَتْ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ رَحْمَتُهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya hannanu anta alladhy wasi`at kulla shay‘in rahmatuhu,
segments.translation: O the All-tender; it is You Whose mercy covers all things.

segments.arabic: يا مَنّانُ ذا الإحْسانِ قَدْ عَمَّ الخَلائِقَ مِنْهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya mannanu dha alihsani qad `amma alkhala’iqa minhu,
segments.translation: O the All-favorer, the Lord of benevolence that He spreads over all the created beings.

segments.arabic: يا دَيّانَ العِبادِ فَكُلٌّ يَقومُ خاضِعاً لِرَهْبَتِهِ.
segments.transliteration: ya dayyana al`ibadi fakullun yaqumu khadi`an lirahbatihi.
segments.translation: O the Master of the servants; everything stands in submission to the fear of Him.

segments.arabic: يا خالِقَ مَنْ في السَّمواتِ وَالأرَضينَ فَكُلٌّ إلَيْهِ مَعادُهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya khaliqa man fy alssamawati walaradina fakullun ilayhi ma`aduhu,
segments.translation: O the Creator of all those in the heavens and the layers of the earth; everything shall be returned to Him.

segments.arabic: يا رَحْمانُ وَراحِمَ كُلِّ صَريخٍ وَمَكْروبٍ وَغِياثَهُ وَمَعاذَهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya rahmanu warahima kulli sarikhin wamakrubin waghiyathahu wama`adhahu,
segments.translation: O the All-beneficent and the All-merciful to and the Aide and the Shelter of all seekers of aid and all aggrieved ones.

segments.arabic: يا بارُّ فَلا تَصِفُ الألْسُنُ كُنْهَ جَلالِ مُلْكِهِ وَعِزِّهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya barru fala tasifu alalsunu kunha jalali mulkihi wa`izzihi,
segments.translation: O the Upright; no language can ever describe the reality of the majesty of His kingdom and might.

segments.arabic: وَيا مُبْدِئَ البَرايا لَمْ يَبْغِ في إنْشائِها أعْواناً مِنْ خَلقِهِ،
segments.transliteration: waya mubd’ia albaraya lam yabghi fy insha’iha a`wanan min khalqihi,
segments.translation: O the Originator of all the creation; in Your creation, You did not need assistants from among Your creatures.

segments.arabic: يا عَلاَّمَ الغُيوبِ فلا يَؤوُدُهُ مِنْ شَيْءٍ حِفْظُهُ.
segments.transliteration: ya `allama alghuyubi fla yau´uduhu min shay‘in hifzuhu.
segments.translation: O the Knower of all the unseen; the preservation of all things does not tire You.

segments.arabic: يا مُعيداً ما أفْناهُ إذا بَرَزَ الخَلائِقُ لِدَعْوَتِهِ مِنْ مَخافَتِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya mu`idan ma afnahu idha baraza alkhala’iqu lida`uatihi min makhafatihi,
segments.translation: O He Who shall restore to life all that which He terminates when the creatures will be resurrected on account of His call out of fear of Him.

segments.arabic: يا حَليمُ ذا الأناةِ فَلا شَيْءَ يَعْدِلُهُ مِنْ خَلْقِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya halimu dha alanaati fala shay‘a ya`diluhu min khalqihi,
segments.translation: O the Forbearing, the Lord of leniency; nothing of Your creatures can ever match You.

segments.arabic: يا مَحْمودَ الفِعالِ ذا الْمَنِّ عَلى جَميعِ خَلْقِهِ بِلُطْفِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya mahmuda alfi`ali dha almanni `alajami`i khalqihi bilutfihi,
segments.translation: O He Whose deeds are praiseworthy, the Lord of favoring on all Your creatures out of Your kindness.

segments.arabic: يا عَزيزُ الْمَنِيعُ الْغالِبُ عَلى أمْرِهِ فَلا شَيْءَ يَعْدِلُهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya `azizu almani`u alghalibu `ala amrihi fala shay‘a ya`diluhu,
segments.translation: O the Almighty, the Invulnerable, the Dominant over all affairs; nothing can ever be equivalent to You.

segments.arabic: يا قاهِرُ ذا الْبَطْشِ الشَّديدِ أنْتَ الَّذي لا يُطاقُ انْتِقامُهُ.
segments.transliteration: ya qahiru dha albatshi alshshadidi anta alladhy la yutaqu antiqamuhu.
segments.translation: O the Overcomer, the owner of strong grip; it is You Whose punishment is intolerable.

segments.arabic: يا مُتَعالي القَريبُ في عُلُوِّ ارْتِفاعِ دُنُوِّهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya muta`aly alqaribu fy `uluwwi artifa`i dunuwwihi,
segments.translation: O the All-exalted, the Nigh in the elevation of Your nearness;

segments.arabic: يا جَبّارُ الْمُذَلِّلَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ بِقَهْرِ عَزيزِ سُلْطانِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya jabbaru almudhallila kulli shay‘in biqahri `azizi sultanihi,
segments.translation: O the All-powerful, the humiliating all things by the prevalence of His almighty authority;

segments.arabic: يا نورَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ أنْتَ الَّذي فَلَقَ الظُّلُماتِ نورُهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya nura kulli shay‘in anta alladhy falaqa alzzulumati nuruhu,
segments.translation: O the Light of all things; it is You Whose light split the darkness.

segments.arabic: يا قُدّوسُ الطّاهِرُ مِنْ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَلا شَيْءَ يَعْدِلُهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya quddusu alttahiru min kulli shay‘in walashay‘a ya`diluhu,
segments.translation: O the Holy, the Wholesome against all things and nothing can ever be His counterpart.

segments.arabic: يا قَريبُ الْمُجيبُ الْمُتَداني دونَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قُرْبَهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya qaribu almujibu almutadany duna kulli shay‘in qurbahu,
segments.translation: O the Nigh; the Responding; and the Approaching very close that He has becomes the nearest of all things.

segments.arabic: يا عالي الشّامِخُ في السَّماءِ فَوقَ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ عُلُوُّ ارْتِفاعِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya `aly alshshamikhu fy alssama‘i fawqa kulli shay‘in `uluwwu artifa`ihi,
segments.translation: O the Elevated; the Exalted in the heavens; whose highness has overtopped all things.

segments.arabic: يا بَديعَ البَدائِعِ وَمُعيدَها بَعْدَ فَنائِها بِقُدْرَتِهِ.
segments.transliteration: ya badi`a albada’i`i wamu`idaha ba`da fana’iha biqudratihi.
segments.translation: O the Wonderful Maker of all wonderful things; and the Restorer of them by His power after they vanish;

segments.arabic: يا جَليلُ الْمُتَكَبِّرُ عَلى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ،
segments.transliteration: ya jalilu almutakabbiru `ala kulli shay‘in,
segments.translation: O the Lofty; the All-great over all things.

segments.arabic: فَالْعَدْلُ أمْرُهُ وَالصِّدْقُ وَعْدُهُ،
segments.transliteration: fal`adlu amruhu walssidqu wa`duhu,
segments.translation: Just are Your affairs, and truthful are Your promises.

segments.arabic: يا مَجيدُ فَلا يَبْلُغُ الأوْهامُ كُلَّ ثَنائِهِ وَمَجْدِهِ،
segments.transliteration: ya majidu fala yablughu al-awhamu kulla thana’ihi wamajdihi,
segments.translation: O the Glorious; even delusions cannot attain all Your praise and glory.

segments.arabic: يا كَريمَ الْعَفْوِ وَالْعَدْلِ،
segments.transliteration: ya karima al`afui wal`adli,
segments.translation: O the Noble in pardon and justice;

segments.arabic: أنْتَ الَّذي مَلأَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ عَدْلُهُ،
segments.transliteration: anta alladhy mala’a kulla shay‘in `adluhu,
segments.translation: It is You Whose justice has filled in everywhere.

segments.arabic: يا عَظِيمُ ذا الثَّناءِ الفاخِرِ وَالْعِزِّ وَالْكِبْرِياءِ فَلا يُذَلُّ عِزُّهُ،
segments.transliteration: ya `azimu dha alththana‘i alfakhiri wal`izzi walkibriya‘i fala yudhallu `izzuhu,
segments.translation: O the Great; the Lord of excellent praise, might, and magnitude; hence, Your might is never humbled.

segments.arabic: يا عَجِيبُ لا تَنْطِقُ الألْسُنُ بِكُلِّ آلائِهِ وَثَنائِهِ.
segments.transliteration: ya `ajibu la tantiqu alalsunu bikulli ala’ihi wathana’ihi.
segments.translation: O the All-excellent; languages cannot express all Your bounties and praise.

segments.arabic: أسْألُكَ يا مُعْتَمَدي عِنْدَ كُلِّ كُرْبَةٍ،
segments.transliteration: asaluka ya mu`tamady `inda kulli kurbatin,
segments.translation: I beseech You; O my Reliance at all griefs;

segments.arabic: وَغِياثي عِنْدَ كُلِّ شِدَّةٍ،
segments.transliteration: waghiyathy `inda kulli shiddatin,
segments.translation: And my Aide at all hardships,

segments.arabic: بِهذِهِ الأسْماءِ أماناً مِنْ عُقوباتِ الدُّنْيا وَالآخِرَةِ،
segments.transliteration: bihdhihi alasma‘i amanan min `uqubati alddunia walakhirati,
segments.translation: (I beseech You) by these names to grant me security against the punishments in this worldly life as well as the Next Life.

segments.arabic: وَأسْألُكَ أنْ تَصْرِفَ عَنّي بِهِنَّ كُلَّ سوءٍ وَمَخوفٍ وَمَحْذورٍ،
segments.transliteration: wasaluka an tasrifa `anny bihinna kulla su‘in wamakhufin wamahdhurin,
segments.translation: And I beseech You to rebuff from me by these Names all things that are evil, feared, and jeopardized,

segments.arabic: وَتَصْرِفَ عَنّي أبْصارَ الظَّلَمَةِ الْمُريدينَ بِيَ السّوءَ الَّذي نَهَيْتَ عَنْهُ
segments.transliteration: watasrifa `anny absara alzzalamati almuridina biya alssu‘a alladhy nahayta `anhu
segments.translation: And to rebuff from me the sights of the wrongdoers who intend evil to me—evil against which You have warned;

segments.arabic: وَأنْ تَصْرِفَ قُلوبَهُمْ مِنْ شَرِّ ما يُضْمِرونَ إلى خَيْرِ ما لا يَمْلِكونَ،
segments.transliteration: wan tasrifa qulubahum min sharri mayudmiruna ila khayri ma la yamlikuna,
segments.translation: And to rebuff from me their hearts and change the evil that they conceal in themselves into the good that they do not have,

segments.arabic: وَلا يَمْلِكُهُ غَيْرُكَ يا كَريمُ.
segments.transliteration: wala yamlikuhu ghayruka ya karimu.
segments.translation: And none else has it save You, O the All-generous.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ لا تَكِلْني إلى نَفْسي فَأعْجَزُ عَنْها،
segments.transliteration: allahumma la takilny ila nafsy fa`jazu `anha,
segments.translation: O Allah: (please) do not refer me to myself, because I will fail to manage it,

segments.arabic: وَلا إلى النّاسِ فَيَرْفُضوني،
segments.transliteration: wala ila alnnasi fayarfuduni,
segments.translation: Or to the people, because they will reject me.

segments.arabic: وَلا تُخَيِّبْني وَأنا أرْجوكَ
segments.transliteration: wala tukhayyibny wana arjuka
segments.translation: And do not disappoint me while I am pleasing You,

segments.arabic: وَلا تُعَذِّبْني وَأنا أدْعُوكَ،
segments.transliteration: wala tu`adhdhibny wana ad`uwka,
segments.translation: And do not torture me while I am praying You.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ إنّي أدْعُوكَ كَما أمَرْتَني،
segments.transliteration: allahumma inny ad`uwka kama amartani,
segments.translation: O Allah: I am praying You as You ordered me to do,

segments.arabic: فَأجِبْنِي كَما وَعَدْتَني،
segments.transliteration: fajibniy kama wa`adtani,
segments.translation: So, (please) answer me as You promised me to do.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ خَيْرَ عُمْري ما وَلِيَ أجَلي.
segments.transliteration: allahumma ij`al khayra `umry ma waliya ajali.
segments.translation: O Allah: (please) make the best of my lifetime be that which is near to my death.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ لا تُغَيِّرْ جَسِدي،
segments.transliteration: allahumma la tughayyir jasidi,
segments.translation: O Allah: (please) do not change my body,

segments.arabic: وَلا تُرْسِلْ حَظّي،
segments.transliteration: wala tursil hazzi,
segments.translation: And do not stop adding to my shares (from Your favors)

segments.arabic: وَلا تَسُؤ صَديقي،
segments.transliteration: wala tasu´ sadiqi,
segments.translation: And do not cause harm to my friend.

segments.arabic: أعوذُ بِكَ مِنْ سَقَمٍ مُصْرِعٍ،
segments.transliteration: a`udhu bika min saqamin musri`in,
segments.translation: I seek Your protection against deadly diseases,

segments.arabic: وَفَقْرٍ مُقْرِعٍ،
segments.transliteration: wafaqrin muqri`in,
segments.translation: And against harsh poverty,

segments.arabic: وَمِنَ الذُّلِّ وَبِئْسَ الْخِلِّ،
segments.transliteration: wamina aldhdhulli wab’isa alkhilli,
segments.translation: And against humiliation and bad company.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ سَلِّ قَلْبي عَنْ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ لا أتَزَوَّدُهُ إلَيْكَ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma salli qalby `an kulli shay‘in laatazawwaduhu ilayka,
segments.translation: O Allah: (please) entertain my heart against all things that cannot act as my provision to You,

segments.arabic: وَلا أنْتَفِعُ بِهِ يَوْمَ ألْقاكَ،
segments.transliteration: wala antafi`u bihi yawma alqaka,
segments.translation: And that cannot avail me on the day when I will meet You,

segments.arabic: مِنْ حَلالٍ أوْ حَرامٍ،
segments.transliteration: min halalin aw haramin,
segments.translation: Be it legal or illegal,

segments.arabic: ثُمَّ أعْطِني قُوَّةً عَلَيْهِ وَعِزّاً وَقَناعَةً وَمَقْتاً لَهُ وَرِضاكَ فِيهِ،
segments.transliteration: thumma a`tiny quwwatan `alayhi wa`izzan waqana`atan wamaqtan lahu waridaka fihi,
segments.translation: And then (please) grant me power over it as well as mighty, contentment, revulsion of it, and Your satisfaction with it.

segments.arabic: يا أرْحَمَ الرّاحِمينَ.
segments.transliteration: ya arhama alrrahimina.
segments.translation: O the most Merciful of all those who show mercy;

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ لكَ الْحَمْدُ عَلى عَطاياكَ الْجَزيلَةِ،
segments.transliteration: allahumma lka alhamdu `ala `atayaka aljazilati,
segments.translation: O Allah: all praise be to You for Your abundant gifts.

segments.arabic: وَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ عَلى مِنَنِكَ الْمُتَواتِرَةِ
segments.transliteration: walaka alhamdu `ala minanika almutawatirati
segments.translation: And all praise be to you for Your uninterrupted favors,

segments.arabic: الَّتي بِها دافَعْتَ عَنّي مَكارِهَ الأُمورِ،
segments.transliteration: allaty biha dafa`ta `anny makariha alaumuri,
segments.translation: By which You have saved me from adverse matters,

segments.arabic: وَبِها آتَيْتَني مَواهِبَ السُّرورِ،
segments.transliteration: wabiha ataytany mawahiba alssururi,
segments.translation: And through which You have bestowed upon me with the donations of pleasure,

segments.arabic: مَعَ تَماديِّ في الغَفْلَةِ،
segments.transliteration: ma`a tamadiyyi fy alghaflati,
segments.translation: Although I persisted in carelessness,

segments.arabic: وَما بَقِيَ فِيَّ مِنَ الْقَسْوَةِ،
segments.transliteration: wama baqiya fiyya mina alqasuati,
segments.translation: And I kept some hardheartedness;

segments.arabic: فَلَمْ يَمْنَعْكَ ذلِكَ مِنْ فِعْلي أنْ عَفَوْتَ عَنّي،
segments.transliteration: falam yamna`ka dhlika min fi`ly an `afawta `anni,
segments.translation: Nevertheless, all such deeds of mine did not stop You from pardoning me,

segments.arabic: وَسَتَرْتَ ذلِكَ عَلَيَّ
segments.transliteration: wasatarta dhlika `alayya
segments.translation: And covering that,

segments.arabic: وَسَوَّغْتَني ما في يَدي مِنْ نِعَمِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wasawwaghtany ma fy yady min ni`amika,
segments.translation: And allowing me to dispose with Your bounties that are at my hand,

segments.arabic: وَتابَعْتَ عَلَيَّ مِنْ إحْسانِكَ،
segments.transliteration: wataba`ta `alayya min ihsanika,
segments.translation: And continuing in doing good to me,

segments.arabic: وَصَفَحْتَ لي عَنْ قَبيحِ ما أفْضَيْتَ بِهِ إلَيْكَ،
segments.transliteration: wasafahta ly `an qabihi ma afdayta bihi ilayka,
segments.translation: And overlooking the ill deeds of which I confessed to You,

segments.arabic: وَانْتَهَكْتَهُ مِنْ مَعاصيكَ.
segments.transliteration: wantahaktahu min ma`asika.
segments.translation: And my violations of doing acts of disobedience to You.

segments.arabic: اللّهُمَّ إنّي أسْألُكَ بِكُلِّ اسْمٍ هُوَ لَكَ
segments.transliteration: allahumma inny asaluka bikulli asmin huwa laka
segments.translation: O Allah: I beseech You by every Name that is Yours,

segments.arabic: يَحِقُّ عَلَيْكَ فيهِ إجابَةَ الدُّعاءِ إذا دُعيتَ بِهِ،
segments.transliteration: yahiqqu `alayka fihi ijabata alddu`a‘i idhadu`ita bihi,
segments.translation: And due to which it becomes incumbent upon You to respond to those who pray You by it,

segments.arabic: وَأسْألُكَ بِكُلِّ ذي حَقٍّ عَلَيْكَ،
segments.transliteration: wasaluka bikulli dhy haqqin `alayka,
segments.translation: And I beseech You in the name of all those who enjoy a right with You

segments.arabic: وَبِحَقِّكَ عَلى جَمِيعِ مَنْ هُوَ دُونَكَ،
segments.transliteration: wabihaqqika `ala jami`i man huwa dunaka,
segments.translation: And in the name of Your duties that are incumbent upon all those who are less than You are,

segments.arabic: أنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِكَ وَرَسُولِكَ وَعَلى آلِهِ،
segments.transliteration: an tusalliya `ala muhammadin `abdika warasuwlika wa`ala alihi,
segments.translation: (I beseech You) to send blessings upon Muhammad, Your servant and Your Messenger, and upon his Household;

segments.arabic: وَمَنْ أرادَني بِسوءٍ فَخُذْ بِسَمْعِهِ وَبَصَرِهِ
segments.transliteration: waman aradany bisu‘in fakhudh bisam`ihi wabasarihi
segments.translation: And as for anyone who intends evil to me, (please) have control on his hearing and sight

segments.arabic: وَمِنْ بَيْنَ يَدَيْهِ وَمِنْ خَلْفِِهِ
segments.transliteration: wamin bayna yadayhi wamin khalf’ihi
segments.translation: And before him and behind him

segments.arabic: وَعَنْ يَمينِهِ وَعَنْ شِمالِهِ
segments.transliteration: wa`an yaminihi wa`an shimalihi
segments.translation: And from his right side and from his left side,

segments.arabic: وَامْنَعْهُ مِنّي بِحَوْلِكَ وَقُوَّتِكَ.
segments.transliteration: wamna`hu minny bihawlika waquwwatika.
segments.translation: And (please) prevent him from harming me through Your might and Your power.

segments.arabic: يا مَنْ لَيْسَ مَعَهُ رَبٌّ يُدْعى،
segments.transliteration: ya man laysa ma`ahu rabbun yud`a,
segments.translation: O He with Whom there is no other lord to be prayed;

segments.arabic: وَيا مَنْ لَيْسَ فَوْقَهُ خالِقٌ يُخْشى،
segments.transliteration: waya man laysa fawqahu khaliqun yukhsha,
segments.translation: O He above Whom there is no other creator to be feared;

segments.arabic: وَيا مَنْ لَيْسَ دونَهُ إلَهٌ يُتَّقى
segments.transliteration: waya man laysa dunahu ilahun yuttaqa
segments.translation: O He other than Whom there is no god to be feared;

segments.arabic: وَيا مَنْ لَيْسَ لَهُ وَزيرٌ يُؤْتى،
segments.transliteration: waya man laysa lahu wazirun yuu´ta,
segments.translation: O He Who has no assistant that may be seen first;

segments.arabic: وَيا مَنْ لَيْسَ لَهُ حاجِبٌ يُرْشى،
segments.transliteration: waya man laysa lahu hajibun yursha,
segments.translation: O He Who has no janitor that may be bribed;

segments.arabic: وَيا مَنْ لَيْسَ لَهُ بَوّابٌ يُنادى،
segments.transliteration: waya man laysa lahu bawwabun yunada,
segments.translation: O He Who has no doorkeeper that may be called;

segments.arabic: وَيا مَنْ لا يَزْدادُ عَلى كَثْرَةِ العَطاءِ إلاَّ كَرَماً وَجُوداً،
segments.transliteration: waya man la yazdadu `ala kathrati al`ata‘i illa karaman wajuwdan,
segments.translation: O He Whose abundant gifting increases him nothing but more generosity and more magnanimity;

segments.arabic: وَعَلى تَتابُعِ الذُّنوبِ إلاَّ مَغْفِرَةً وَعَفْواً،
segments.transliteration: wa`ala tatabu`i aldhdhunubi illamaghfiratan wa`afuan,
segments.translation: And the flow of sinning (of His servants) increases him nothing but forgiveness and pardon.

segments.arabic: صَلِّ عَلى مُحَمَّدٍ وَآلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
segments.transliteration: salli `ala muhammadin wali muhammadin
segments.translation: (please) send blessings upon Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

segments.arabic: وَافْعَلْ بي ما أنْتَ أهْلُهُ،
segments.transliteration: waf`al by ma anta ahluhu,
segments.translation: And do to me that which befits You,

segments.arabic: وَلا تَفْعَلْ بي ما أنا أهْلُهُ،
segments.transliteration: wala taf`al by ma ana ahluhu,
segments.translation: And do not do to me that which I deserve,

segments.arabic: فَإنَّك أهْلُ التَّقْوى وَأهْلُ الْمَغْفِرَةِ.
segments.transliteration: Fa’innak ahlu alttaqwa wa-ahlu almaghfirati.
segments.translation: For You are the worthiest of being feared and the worthiest of forgiving.

_index_meta.title: Dua Nabi Idris - Dua for sahar time (commencing the fast)
